lines: MiMo-V2-Flash / TTS will auto-route to V2.5 (with V2.5 pricing) on June 18, 2026, 00:00 / June 25, 2026, 00:00 (GMT+8), and will be fully deprecated by June 30. Please migrate to the V2.5 series before the legacy names expire. Learn More →

What does the full upgrade of subscription plan quotas mean?

To help developers access AI at lower costs, the Xiaomi MiMo team has been continuously optimizing inference performance and has achieved significant progress. Effective May 26, 2026 at 24:00 (Beijing Time), Credits quotas across all plan tiers will be fully upgraded with no price increase — delivering 5–8x more value per plan.
